articles.title: AI 'Destroying the Internet,' Threatening Jobs
articles.summary: A critical analysis from 404 Media argues that current research on AI's impact on employment frequently overlooks how AI is systemically 'destroying the internet.' This destruction manifests through the proliferation of AI-generated content, diminishing the value of human creative work, and ultimately eroding the revenue streams that support vast segments of the online economy. It contends that this degradation of the internet poses a more profound threat to jobs than direct automation.

articles.title: Digital Euro Requires Worker Input for Success
articles.summary: Project Syndicate argues that the European Central Bank's Digital Euro initiative requires significant input from workers and their representatives to ensure its successful implementation and broad public acceptance. Without addressing potential concerns around privacy, labor rights, and economic inequality, a Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) risks alienation and failure, underscoring the critical social dimension of financial innovation.
articles.deck: The Digital Euro's success hinges on incorporating worker input, per Project Syndicate, ensuring broad societal acceptance.
